Lesser Magic.name: Fires of U'Zhul
Lesser Magic.description: A ball of fire with a range of 18 inches, hits the first target in its path, Strength 4, normal armor saves.

Lesser Magic.name: Zimmeran's Flight
Lesser Magic.description: Immediate movement of up to 12 inches, including into contact with an enemy (counts as a charge).

Lesser Magic.name: Aramar's Terror
Lesser Magic.description: A single model within 12 inches of the caster must pass a Ld test or be treated as Knocked Down from fear. Does not affect Undead or Fearless models.

Lesser Magic.name: Silver Arrows of Arha
Lesser Magic.description: Cannot be cast in close combat. Summons k6+2 arrows that can be sent at one model. Range 24 inches. Use the wizard's BS to determine hits, ignoring penalties for movement or cover. Each arrow has Strength 3.

Lesser Magic.name: Shemtek's Luck
Lesser Magic.description: The wizard can reroll all failed rolls, but the second result stands. Lasts until the beginning of the wizard's next turn.

Lesser Magic.name: Rezhebel's Sword
Lesser Magic.description: A summoned sword gives the wizard +1 Attack (A), +2 Weapon Skill (WS), and +2 Strength (S). At the start of each of the wizard's team turns, roll his Ld; if the test fails, the sword disappears.

Prayers of Sigmar.name: Hammer of Sigmar
Prayers of Sigmar.description: The target receives +2S in close combat and doubles damage (2 wounds instead of 1). The caster must test the spell difficulty each shooting phase to maintain it.

Prayers of Sigmar.name: Hearts of Steel
Prayers of Sigmar.description: All allied warriors within 8" become immune to Fear. Additionally, the entire warband gets +1 to pass Rout tests. The spell lasts until the caster is knocked down, stunned, or OOA. Recasting does not stack.

Prayers of Sigmar.name: Soulfire
Prayers of Sigmar.description: All enemy models within 4" of the caster receive a S3 hit. Ignores armor saves. Possessed and Undead receive a S5 hit.

Prayers of Sigmar.name: Shield of Faith
Prayers of Sigmar.description: The Priest becomes immune to all spells. At the start of his turn, roll k6 – on 1-2 the shield disappears.

Prayers of Sigmar.name: Healing Hand
Prayers of Sigmar.description: All models within 2", including the caster, regain their full pool of Wounds. Additionally, all knocked down and stunned models in range automatically stand up and can fight normally.

Prayers of Sigmar.name: Armor of Righteousness
Prayers of Sigmar.description: The caster receives a 2+ armor save, which replaces his normal save. Additionally, he causes fear and becomes immune to it. The armor lasts until the player's next shooting phase.

Waaaagh! Magic.name: 'Ere We Go!
Waaaagh! Magic.description: Every Orc or Goblin within 4 inches of the Shaman automatically strikes first in close combat, regardless of circumstances. The spell lasts until the shaman is knocked down, stunned, or OOA.

Waaaagh! Magic.name: Gidoutahere!
Waaaagh! Magic.description: Range 8 inches. Moves every enemy model on its line by d6 inches away from the Shaman. If the target hits a building, obstacle, or enemy model, each receives a S3 hit. Cannot be cast on models in close combat.

Waaaagh! Magic.name: Zzap!
Waaaagh! Magic.description: Range 12 inches. D3 hits with S4 on the nearest enemy target, without armor saves.

Waaaagh! Magic.name: Gofers!
Waaaagh! Magic.description: Until his next round, no enemy models can charge the Shaman. If the shaman is in close combat, he may immediately move up to 4 inches away from it.

Waaaagh! Magic.name: Thump!
Waaaagh! Magic.description: A club appears in the shaman's hand, acting as a normal club with a +2 Strength bonus and adding +1 Attack to him. The spell lasts until the Shaman receives any wound.

Waaaagh! Magic.name: Gork's Fire
Waaaagh! Magic.description: Two fiery projectiles fly from the shaman's nose with a range of 12 inches, each dealing k3 hits with S3. Both can hit one nearest model or be split between the two nearest models.

Necromancy.name: Life Leech
Necromancy.description: Choose a single model within 6 inches of the caster. The target receives an automatic wound without armor saves, and the caster gains one wound, which can raise their value even above the allowed maximum. The spell does not affect Undead or Possessed models.

Necromancy.name: Re-Animation
Necromancy.description: One zombie that went OOA in the last shooting or combat phase (but not Large) can immediately return to the fight. You must place it within 6 inches of the caster and not in base contact with an enemy.

Necromancy.name: Death Vision
Necromancy.description: The caster causes Fear until the end of the skirmish.

Necromancy.name: Spell of Doom
Necromancy.description: Choose an enemy model within 12 inches of the caster. The model must immediately roll less than or equal to its Strength on a k6, or automatically roll on the Injury table.

Necromancy.name: Vanhel's Danse Macabre
Necromancy.description: A single Ghoul or Dire Wolf within 6 inches of the caster can immediately move again at its maximum movement distance (but without running). If this movement reaches an enemy, it counts as charging.

Necromancy.name: Spell of Awakening
Necromancy.description: If an opponent of the Undead warband dies in battle with them, the necromancer can resurrect them as a Zombie. The resurrected model retains stats and equipment but cannot use skills or ranged weapons.

Magic of the Horned Rat.name: Warpfire
Magic of the Horned Rat.description: A projectile flying for 8 inches and hitting the first target in its path. Deals D3 hits with Strength 4 to the target and one hit with Strength 3 to every model within 2 inches of that target.

Magic of the Horned Rat.name: Children of the Horned Rat
Magic of the Horned Rat.description: The spell must be used before the battle and only once per battle. Summons D3 Giant Rats, which must be deployed within 6 inches of the Warlock. The rats disappear immediately after the battle.

Magic of the Horned Rat.name: Gnaw
Magic of the Horned Rat.description: The spell deals 2D6 hits with Strength 1 to one model within 8 inches of the caster.

Magic of the Horned Rat.name: Black Fury
Magic of the Horned Rat.description: The caster immediately charges an enemy within 12 inches (ignoring terrain and models in the way), receiving 2 extra Attacks and +1 Strength in this single round of close combat.

Magic of the Horned Rat.name: Eye of the Warp
Magic of the Horned Rat.description: All standing models in contact with the caster must pass a Ld test. If they fail, they receive a Strength 3 hit and must move 2D6 inches away from the caster.

Magic of the Horned Rat.name: Sorcerer's Curse
Magic of the Horned Rat.description: Spell at 12" on one model in range. The target must reroll all successful armor saves and hit rolls in the current Skaven turn and their upcoming shooting and close combat phase.

Chaos Rituals.name: Visions of Torment
Chaos Rituals.description: Has a range of 6" and must be cast at the nearest model. The model is automatically Stunned, and if it cannot be Stunned, it is Knocked Down.

Chaos Rituals.name: Eye of God
Chaos Rituals.description: Choose a model within 6 inches, friendly or enemy, and roll k6: 1 – wrath of the gods (OOA), 2-5 – +1 to a selected characteristic, 6 – +1 to every characteristic for the duration of the skirmish.

Chaos Rituals.name: Dark Blood
Chaos Rituals.description: Attack with a range of 8 inches, dealing k3 hits with Strength 5. Hits the first model in its path. After using this spell, the model must roll for Injury, but treat OOA as Stunned.

Chaos Rituals.name: Temptation of Chaos
Chaos Rituals.description: The spell has a range of 12 inches and must be cast at the nearest model. Test against the wizard's Ld. If the wizard wins, he takes control of the model until a Ld test is passed in the Rally phase.

Chaos Rituals.name: Wings of Darkness
Chaos Rituals.description: Immediate movement of up to 12 inches, including into contact with an enemy (counts as a charge).

Chaos Rituals.name: Word of Pain
Chaos Rituals.description: All models (including friendly ones) within 3 inches of the wizard receive a S3 hit, without armor saves.

Prayers of Taal.name: Stag's Leap
Prayers of Taal.description: The Priest's model can move up to 9", including getting into contact with an enemy - it then counts as charging with +1 Strength.

Prayers of Taal.name: Golden Nectar
Prayers of Taal.description: A model up to 2" from the priest (including him) can heal the full number of their wounds. Additionally, all living models within a 2" radius lose 1 Attack.

Prayers of Taal.name: Bear's Paw
Prayers of Taal.description: Any friendly model within 6" range receives +2 Strength until the Priest's warband's next turn.

Prayers of Taal.name: Earth's Wrath
Prayers of Taal.description: All terrain within 12" of the Priest becomes Difficult Terrain (models cannot run and can charge for the distance of their Movement (M)).

Prayers of Taal.name: Summon Rodents
Prayers of Taal.description: Point to an enemy model within 12 inches of the Priest. It receives 2k6 hits with Strength 1, without armor saves.

Prayers of Taal.name: Taal's Blessing
Prayers of Taal.description: Decrease the difficulty of one of the prayers already possessed by you by 1.
